findings.note: engine-e FALSE-POSITIVE. placementRank is documented OPTIONAL (not in the schema's required[]); the API emits it only for placed/pinned projects (cold-audit #225), so absence from an unplaced sample is spec-compliant. Fixed the DETECTOR (engine-e now classifies optional-absent as informational `optionalAbsent`, not drift `missingFields`); spec + API unchanged. Re-run: missingFields 0.

engine-e FALSE-POSITIVE. explain `note` is documented OPTIONAL; the route emits it only on specific answer/error paths, absent otherwise — spec-compliant. Resolved by the detector fix (optional-absent ≠ drift), not a spec/API change.
engine-e FALSE-POSITIVE. explain `note2` is documented OPTIONAL and conditionally emitted; absence is spec-compliant. Resolved by the detector fix.

engine-e FALSE-POSITIVE. meta.fallbackChannels is documented OPTIONAL and emitted ONLY in the empty-state (route.ts ~247/288) — by design absent when hackathons exist. Resolved by the detector fix; the conditional field is real and must stay in the spec.
engine-e FALSE-POSITIVE. meta.filters is documented OPTIONAL on the single-hackathon route, conditionally present; absence is spec-compliant. Resolved by the detector fix.
engine-e FALSE-POSITIVE. meta.counts is documented OPTIONAL, conditionally present; absence is spec-compliant. Resolved by the detector fix.

engine-e FALSE-POSITIVE. winners[].hackathonPrize is documented OPTIONAL and emitted only when DoraHacks exposes a per-winner prize (w.prizeUsd); dropped when undefined — spec-compliant. Resolved by the detector fix; the field is real and correctly optional.
